title: Controlled resource-pressure Gantt: fixed fastest path vs joint recipe scheduling
notes: Shows shared BIST serialization in fixed-fastest and BIST/FPP overlap in joint scheduling.

title: Shared BIST engine and FPP lane occupancy
notes: Explains that fixed-fastest underuses FPP lanes while serializing on BIST; joint scheduling overlaps both resources.

title: M18 pressure-case gain and selected recipe mix
notes: Summarizes the 46% gain and shows that joint schedules deliberately mix BIST and FPP recipes.
